name: Inventory Technician Onboarding
description: Complete onboarding process for inventory management technician

steps.title: Verify Technician Credentials
steps.description: Confirm required certifications and background checks

substeps.title: Verify background check completion
substeps.description: Confirm clean background check for inventory access

steps.title: Set Up Inventory System Access
steps.description: Configure access to inventory management systems

substeps.title: Create inventory system login
substeps.description: Set up username and password for inventory management system

substeps.title: Assign appropriate permissions
substeps.description: Configure access levels based on role and responsibilities

substeps.title: Configure barcode scanning equipment
substeps.description: Assign and configure handheld barcode scanners

substeps.title: Assign warehouse zones
substeps.description: Define which warehouse areas technician will manage

steps.title: Complete Inventory Training
steps.description: Ensure completion of all inventory-specific training

substeps.title: Complete inventory procedures training
substeps.description: Learn cycle counting, receiving, and shipping procedures

substeps.title: Complete warehouse safety training
substeps.description: Understand safety procedures for warehouse operations

substeps.title: Complete inventory system training
substeps.description: Learn to use inventory management software effectively

substeps.title: Update personnel database
substeps.description: Add technician to inventory department roster

substeps.title: Assign experienced mentor
substeps.description: Pair with experienced technician for initial guidance
